---
title: "Welcome to Afreen's Portfolio"
author: "Afreen Alam"
date: "05-21-2026"
---

## Professional Summary

I am a data professional currently pursuing my Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University. I bring over three years of industry experience across financial services, healthcare, and digital analytics. My expertise spans building scalable Generative AI/RAG systems, deploying predictive machine learning architectures, and engineering end-to-end data pipelines that drive strategic business decisions.

---

## Download CV

You can view or download the full copy of my CV by clicking the link below:

### [📥 Download Afreen Alam's CV (PDF)](Afreen_Alam_02-12-2026.pdf)

---

## Experience Highlight

*   **Generative AI & LLMs:** Built section-scoped RAG pipelines for SEC 10-K filings and bank annual reports using LangChain, FAISS, and Qwen, improving retrieval precision by 35%.
*   **Predictive Analytics:** Engineered an XGBoost cash-balance forecasting model resulting in a 43% reduction in idle cash buffers for platinum corporate clients.
*   **Data Governance & Risk:** Collaborating with university faculty to evaluate over 20 explainable-AI (XAI) and risk mitigation tools against enterprise AI vulnerabilities.
